jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Groww
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Groww in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Groww:
Groww is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Groww!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
